title: Jimmy Kimmel Reignites Trump’s War on Disney
description: Brendan Carr doesn’t need Disney to cancel Jimmy Kimmel to declare victory

title: Apple Signals New CEO Ternus Will Invest Cash Differently Than Cook
Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
description: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency said it has summoned former economy minister Rafizi Ramli for questioning following a probe into a deal involving Arm Holdings Plc.
